text:
Centre for Epilepsy

Neurosciences Division

Clinic Date: 11 July 2016

Dr Patel
Elm Grove Medical Practice
78 Elm Grove, Brighton BN2 3DF

Dear Dr Patel,

Michael Thompson, DOB: 22-11-1978, Hospital No: H392771 NHS No. 9431125876
45 Seaside Road, Eastbourne BN21 3PX

Generalised Epilepsy

Thank you for your urgent referral. We acknowledge receipt of an urgent appointment request for triage regarding Michael Thompson, who has generalised epilepsy. The patient’s Type 2 diabetes is managed in primary care and will be noted for peri-appointment considerations.

Action plan:
- We will triage the referral within 5 working days.
- We aim to offer the earliest suitable clinic slot; our team will contact the patient directly to schedule.
- Please ensure a current medication list and any recent blood results are available via shared care records.

If there are any new concerns or if urgent neurological review is required sooner, please contact our triage line.

Yours sincerely

check__Seizure Frequency Number.analysis: The letter is an administrative triage acknowledgement for a patient with generalised epilepsy. It contains no mention of seizures or seizure frequency, nor any statement about being seizure-free. There are no numeric or qualitative frequency descriptors. Therefore, there is no seizure frequency reference in the letter.
reference: Create a reasonable NHS letter acknowledging receipt of an urgent epilepsy appointment request for triage

flaws.description: No seizure frequency referenced in gold
Row marked as not OK in raw dataset
